name: sheets
description: Read, write, and manage Google Sheets spreadsheets

tools.name: List Spreadsheets
tools.description: List recent Google Sheets spreadsheets from Drive

tools.name: Get Spreadsheet
tools.description: Get spreadsheet metadata including sheet names and properties

tools.name: Read Range
tools.description: Read cell data from a spreadsheet range

tools.name: Write Range
tools.description: Write data to a spreadsheet range

tools.name: Create Spreadsheet
tools.description: Create a new spreadsheet with optional initial data

prompts.title: Analyze spreadsheet data
prompts.prompt: Read and analyze data from a Google Sheets spreadsheet. Provide insights, trends, and statistics.

prompts.title: Create a report spreadsheet
prompts.prompt: Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet with formatted data, headers, and calculations.

prompts.title: Update a tracker
prompts.prompt: Update a tracking spreadsheet with new data. Add rows, update values, or calculate totals.
